headline: Jhon Duran
body: Benfica have held positive talks with Jhon Duran over a potential move. Al-Nassr prepared to sanction an exit as Duran has made it clear he wants to leave Saudi Arabia. It follows loans to Fenerbahçe and Zenit since Duran's move to Al-Nassr from Aston Villa.🇨🇴
raw_text:
Benfica have held positive talks with Jhon Duran over a potential move.

Al-Nassr prepared to sanction an exit as Duran has made it clear he wants to leave Saudi Arabia. It follows loans to Fenerbahçe and Zenit since Duran's move to Al-Nassr from Aston Villa.🇨🇴
text:
Benfica have held positive talks with Jhon Duran over a potential move.

Al-Nassr prepared to sanction an exit as Duran has made it clear he wants to leave Saudi Arabia. It follows loans to Fenerbahçe and Zenit since Duran's move to Al-Nassr from Aston Villa.🇨🇴
